verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Little girl was lying there the people all were weeping, They just laughed at Jesus when He said she's only sleeping, As He took her by the hand she began to live again, Some began to praise the Lord and some began to say.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He's in the house, Death had to flee, Now there is life Where darkness use to be, Now there is hope, There's no more doubt, Praise His name (2x) He's in the house.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was like that little girl dead in all my sin, Till Jesus touched this heart of mine and gave me life again, I am just a house of clay, And every since that blessed day, there's a light that shines in me, for all the world to see.
